---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: mufflyt
---

## Summary

A brief description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation

Why would this feature be useful? What use case does it address?

## Proposed interface

If applicable, sketch what the function signature or workflow might look like:

```r
# Example of how you'd like to call it
mysterycall_new_function(data, argument = "value")
```

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds or alternative approaches you've tried.
